query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'jobs' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('scheduledDropoffAt','pickupContactName','pickupContactPhone','dropoffContactName','dropoffContactPhone','customerName','travelRouteData');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 29dmg1z8s7MGkda.cd2f01f00c99 --database 6VTDyDwMUZs22XSbYJviE3 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'jobs' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('scheduledDropoffAt','pickupContactName','pickupContactPhone','dropoffContactName','dropoffContactPhone','customerName','travelRouteData');
